summary: Final re-verification of the focus-state 'box in box' bug (3rd round). Confirmed via grep on the live served build AND live browser DOM that type="text" is correctly present on #namaResponden, #omzet_1, #gajiPerOrang_1, #jamsosPerOrang_1, #thrPerOrang_1. Confirmed via getComputedStyle while focused that borderStyle='none' (never 'inset') and outlineStyle='none' (never 'auto') on all tested fields. Screenshots visually confirm only the custom pink/maroon border + soft glow, no black native inset box. Regression check passed: typing '1000000' into Omzet field correctly auto-formats to '1.000.000' confirming input handling/calculation JS (hitungOtomatis) still functions.

verification_details.build_file_grep: grep -oE '<input[^>]*id="X"[^>]*>' on /app/frontend/public/webapp/index.html shows type="text" present on namaResponden, omzet_1, gajiPerOrang_1, jamsosPerOrang_1, thrPerOrang_1

live_dom_getAttribute_type.jamsosPerOrang_1: text (confirmed in earlier run before flow required jumlahUsaha=1)

verification_details.note: borderStyle is 'none' rather than a visible custom style value because the custom pink border is likely applied via box-shadow/outline-like technique or a background/border-color combo that getComputedStyle reports differently than 'solid'; regardless, the critical assertion (NOT 'inset', NOT 'auto') passes for all 3 fields, and screenshots visually confirm a clean pink border + glow with zero black inset artifact.
verification_details.regression_check: Typing 1000000 into #omzet_1 -> value auto-formatted to '1.000.000', confirming number formatting/calculation JS pipeline (hitungOtomatis) still works after rebuild. Had to first set #jumlahUsaha select to '1' via renderUsahaTabs() to reveal the Usaha 1 inner tab fields (gaji/jamsos/thr) - this is expected app UX flow, not a bug.

seed_data_creation: None persisted - test data (Toko Maju Jaya responden, omzet 1000000) was only entered in-browser via localStorage-backed state during Playwright session, not committed to any shared seed/prod store.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The focus-state box-in-box bug is now CONFIRMED FIXED at the root (build.sh no longer strips type='text' via html-minifier-terser's --remove-redundant-attributes). Verified both via static grep on the served build file and live getAttribute/getComputedStyle checks in the browser across 3 distinct input fields (Responden tab + Usaha 1 tab, including a Tenaga Kerja nested card field). No further action needed on this specific bug unless a future rebuild reintroduces the stripping flag.
rca_of_issue: Already resolved by main agent in this round; RCA per main agent: html-minifier-terser's --remove-redundant-attributes flag stripped type="text" from built HTML (since 'text' is the default value for <input> and was considered 'redundant'), breaking the CSS selector input[type="text"]:focus { ... } used to override native browser focus styling (black inset border/outline). Fix: removed that flag from build.sh's minifier invocation and rebuilt. Verified fix holds via this testing round.
